'''Avon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the same [[Star system/Legends|system]] as [[Radnor/Legends|Radnor]]. Its inhabitants were the [[Avoni]]. Avon was, for the most part, distrusted by the [[Radnoran]]s. In the years following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], Avon sent a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Warship/Legends|warships]] to invade and occupy Radnor, in revenge for the Radnorans not selling them a deadly new bioweapon that they developed. However, with intervention from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], their attempts were short-lived.

{{Planet-stub}}
